title: Unexpected Right Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50), c3 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES(1, 'test', '{"key": "value"}');
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 INT, c5 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t2(c4, c5) VALUES(1, TRUE), (2, FALSE);
SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN t2 ON t1.c3 IS NOT NULL WHERE t2.c5 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: RIGHT JOIN with JSON.ISVALID returns unexpected empty result
